meta.protocol: BMAD A2A — Builder Report to Architect

what_works: execute_task() pipeline with CostGuard budget check
BEAD-009 subsystems: OAuth, RBAC, MailServer (8765), TaskManager, Orchestrator
Security sprint: SafetyLayer, LeakDetector, CommandGuard, SandboxEnforcer, NetworkGuard, EnvScrubber
gaps: Hermes Agent wiring — COMPLETELY MISSING from kernel
Chess Theater 3D (Three.js) — not wired into kernel startup
Popebot comms layer — soul file exists, no implementation imported
TurboQuant KV cache compression — listed as PARTIAL in spec
Agent soul initialization — kernel does not load .agent-souls files on boot
BMAD A2A protocol hooks — no phase/gate enforcement in execute_task()

white_crew.status: FILES EXIST — NOT LOADED BY KERNEL

black_crew.status: FILES EXIST — NOT LOADED BY KERNEL

components.chess-engine: board.rs, agents.rs (32-piece AGENT_ROSTER with ElevenLabs voice IDs), moves.rs, validation.rs

chess_engine_rust.agent_roster: Full 32-piece roster defined with voice IDs — white (ranks 1-2) = production crew, black (ranks 7-8) = staging crew
gaps: No WebSocket bridge for real-time board state updates
chess-server API endpoints not mapped to kernel agent actions
Voice activation not wired to ElevenLabs (keys in env only)

agent_theater.description: Token-gated live event stream: TheaterEvent, TheaterSession, AgentTheater with pub/sub
agent_theater.gap: This is a Python event bus, NOT the Three.js Chess Theater 3D visualization required

cost_guard.gap: Previous audit noted cost_guard was dead-coded (never called from execution path) — kernel.py DOES call it in execute_task() now, needs verification

rust_workspace.status: EXISTS — Rust rewrite in progress (HEAD branch is rewrite branch)

archonx_config.error: Duplicate key 'backend_url' in openclaw integration block — invalid JSON

GAP_001.description: pauli-hermes-agent repo NOT present locally or cloned. No hermes/ directory exists anywhere in the codebase. Zero multi-agent reasoning/debate implementation.
GAP_001.impact: Entire Karpathy LLM Council pattern, white vs black crew debate, consensus mechanism — ALL non-functional
GAP_001.fix: Clone pauli-hermes-agent repo OR implement hermes/agent.py with Council pattern from scratch

GAP_002.description: agent_theater.py is a Python event bus (pub/sub). No Three.js/WebGL 3D visualization exists. archonx-chess Rust backend exists but has no 3D frontend.
GAP_002.impact: Zero visual Chess Theater — the architectural centerpiece of production launch
GAP_002.fix: Build chess-theater/ Next.js app with Three.js r128, consuming chess-server WS events on port 3300

GAP_003.description: popebot_bishop.soul.md defines the persona. No Popebot implementation exists for email, social media, Slack, SMS, or any external comms.
GAP_003.impact: Agents cannot communicate externally. Revenue engine cannot send invoices/alerts. No external pipeline.
GAP_003.fix: Implement archonx/comms/popebot.py with SMTP, Twilio, social API clients (all keys from Infisical)

GAP_004.description: 37 soul files exist in .agent-souls/ but kernel.py does not load/parse them on boot. Agents operate without their defined personality/role/voice configuration.
GAP_004.impact: WhiteCrew and BlackCrew agents have no soul-based behavior, voice IDs, or role specialization
GAP_004.fix: Add SoulLoader to kernel.__init__ that reads .agent-souls/**/*.soul.md and injects into agent configs

GAP_005.description: No BMAD protocol enforcer in codebase. execute_task() has no phase gates. Agents can't formally handoff or request direction.
GAP_005.impact: Architect↔Builder handoff has no mechanical enforcement — discipline only
GAP_005.fix: Implement archonx/protocols/bmad.py with PhaseGate, ArchitectHandoff, BuilderBlocker classes

GAP_006.description: No standalone SYNTHIA 3.0 app. synthia_queen.soul.md exists as agent persona only. No Spanish-first LATAM design AI product.
GAP_006.impact: Production launch missing entire SYNTHIA 3.0 product (one of two primary deliverables)
GAP_006.fix: Create synthia-3-0/ Next.js app: Spanish-first, LATAM targeting, subscription model, UDEC gate

GAP_007.status: PARTIAL — in archonx/inference but not confirmed active
GAP_007.description: TurboQuant KV cache compression listed as PARTIAL in kernel gaps. archonx/inference/ directory not confirmed to exist.
GAP_007.impact: Long context runs will be expensive and slow without compression
GAP_007.fix: Verify archonx/inference/ exists, wire TurboQuant into execute_task() context compression path

GAP_008.description: Even when Chess Theater 3D is built, no bridge exists between kernel agent actions and chess board state. archonx/visualization/chessboard.py and chess-server on port 3300 are disconnected.
GAP_008.impact: 3D visualization won't reflect real agent activity
GAP_008.fix: Implement WebSocket bridge: kernel.execute_task() → agent_theater.emit() → chess-server WS → Three.js frontend

GAP_009.description: Duplicate key 'backend_url' in openclaw integration block makes the config file invalid JSON. Any JSON parser will error.
GAP_009.impact: KernelConfig initialization will fail if it strictly parses archonx-config.json
GAP_009.fix: IMMEDIATE: Remove duplicate 'backend_url' key from archonx-config.json

GAP_010.description: openclaw-integration/ contains only README.md. Config points to localhost:8080 but no OpenClaw implementation exists.
GAP_010.fix: Implement openclaw-integration client or document that it's a future phase dependency

GAP_011.description: HEAD is on claude/archonx-rust-rewrite-plan-Gjd43 (Rust rewrite branch). Target branch feat/production-hardening doesn't exist. main is behind origin/main. 9 modified files uncommitted.
GAP_011.impact: PR to production-hardening branch cannot proceed from wrong HEAD
GAP_011.fix: Cherry-pick or merge needed changes to feat/production-hardening branch (create if missing)

GAP_012.description: RevenueEngine is imported and initialized in kernel.py but actual implementation not scanned. Needs verification it's not a stub.
GAP_012.impact: If stub: self-sustaining revenue generation nonexistent
GAP_012.fix: Audit archonx/ for revenue_engine.py or equivalent, verify non-stub status

hardening_plan.overview: 23 action items across 4 priority tiers. Phases are sequenced — P0 unblocks everything.

actions.fix: Remove duplicate 'backend_url' key from openclaw integration block

actions.task: Commit current 9 modified files with meaningful message
commands: git commit -m '[PHASE-0] Capture pre-hardening state snapshot'
blocker_for: Clean working tree for phase work

actions.description: Add SoulLoader class that reads .agent-souls/**/*.soul.md on boot and injects soul config into WhiteCrew/BlackCrew agent instances
actions.spec_note: Parse YAML front-matter from .soul.md files for: agent_id, role, voice_id, crew

actions.description: PhaseGate(current_phase, allowed_phases), ArchitectHandoff(phase, spec_json), BuilderBlocker(blocker_description, requesting_direction) dataclasses + BMAdProtocol enforcement class
If archonx/inference/turbo_quant.py does not exist: create stub with compress_context(ctx, max_tokens) → compressed_ctx. Wire into execute_task() after task routing.
Spec the Karpathy LLM Council pattern: HermesAgent class, WhiteCouncil.challenge(), BlackCouncil.solve(), consensus(), execution(). Ready for Phase 2 implementation.
Spec the Three.js Chess Theater: scenes, piece models, WS protocol from chess-server (port 3300), animation states (idle/active/thinking/moved), camera system
Spec per-agent comms: email (SMTP), social (Twitter/LinkedIn), Slack webhooks, SMS (Twilio). All keys from Infisical. Interface: popebot.send(agent_id, channel, message)

phase_2_implementation.label: IMPLEMENTATION (8-12 hrs, requires Phase 1 specs approved)

actions.task: Implement Hermes Agent with Karpathy LLM Council

actions.stack: Next.js 15 + Three.js r128 + GLSL shaders + WebSocket client to chess-server:3300

actions.pattern: All credentials via Infisical — ZERO hardcoded keys

actions.description: When kernel.execute_task() fires: emit to agent_theater → forward over WS to chess-server → update board state → broadcast to Chess Theater 3D frontend

actions.task: Wire kernel soul loading on boot
actions.description: Call SoulLoader.load_all() in kernel.boot(), inject into WhiteCrew + BlackCrew, activate ElevenLabs voice IDs per agent

phase_3_deployment.label: DEPLOYMENT (2-3 hrs, human provides Vercel Project IDs)

actions.task: Run full test suite — all green before deploy
Build Docker images for all services

actions.human_input: Provide prj_... IDs for archonx-os and synthia-3-0

risk_register.risk: Hermes Agent is a full new system — scope may exceed Phase 2 timeline
risk_register.mitigation: Build minimal viable Hermes (single Council loop) first; full debate pattern in Phase 3

risk_register.risk: Three.js Chess Theater PS5-grade graphics = high complexity
risk_register.mitigation: Start with functional but simple 3D (Three.js BoxGeometry pieces); GLSL shaders as enhancement, not blocker

risk_register.risk: Infisical secret access may not be configured in local dev environment
risk_register.mitigation: Verify Infisical CLI is available; fall back to env vars for dev, Infisical mandatory for prod

risk_register.risk: archonx-config.json JSON error may cause silent failures
risk_register.mitigation: Fix H-001 IMMEDIATELY before any other work

risk_register.risk: HEAD branch (Rust rewrite) may conflict with production-hardening work
risk_register.mitigation: Create feat/production-hardening from main (H-002); cherry-pick only needed Rust changes

critical_path: H-001 (fix JSON) → H-002 (create branch) → H-005,H-006,H-007,H-008,H-009,H-010 (Phase 1 parallel) → ARCHITECT REVIEW → H-011 through H-016 (Phase 2 parallel) → H-017 through H-020 (Phase 3)

request_for_phase_1_approval.message: PHASE 0 COMPLETE. Gap analysis produced. 3 critical gaps identified (Hermes, Chess Theater 3D, Popebot). 4 immediate fixes ready to execute. Hardening plan covers 20 action items across Phases 1-3. Requesting explicit: 'APPROVED: START PHASE_1' to proceed with architecture specs and immediate fixes. Standing by.
phase_0_deliverables: ✅ 12 gaps catalogued with severity and fix plan
ready_to_execute_immediately: H-001: Fix archonx-config.json JSON syntax error
